mapper.sql: ${alias}.member_id ,${alias}.login_id ,${alias}.enc_passwd ,${alias}.passwd_dt ,${alias}.passwd_init ,${alias}.member_nm ,${alias}.nickname ,${alias}.gender ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('DEPT_CD', ${alias}.dept_nm) as dept_nm ,${alias}.position_nm ,${alias}.authority_id ,(select authority_nm from cmmt_authority where authority_id = ${alias}.authority_id) as authority_nm ,${alias}.member_st ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('MEMBER_ST', ${alias}.member_st) as member_st_nm ,${alias}.member_st_dt ,${alias}.enc_tel_no ,${alias}.enc_mobile_no ,${alias}.enc_email ,${alias}.member_ips ,${alias}.refresh_token ,${alias}.creator_id ,${alias}.created_dt ,${alias}.updater_id ,${alias}.updated_dt ,${alias}.last_login_dt
mapper.select: /** CmmtInsiderDao.selectCount */ select count(login_id) as cnt from cmmt_insider a where
mapper.sql:
1=1 and member_st = 'NORMAL'
and member_nm like '%'||#{param.memberNm}||'%'
and login_id = #{param.loginId}
and fn_cmm_get_code_nm('DEPT_CD', dept_nm) like '%'||#{param.deptNm}||'%'
mapper.select: /** CmmtInsiderDao.selectCount */ select count(*) as cnt from cmmt_insider where

/** CmmtInsiderDao.selectSrchPicList */ select a.member_id ,a.login_id ,a.member_nm ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('DEPT_CD', a.dept_nm) as dept_nm ,a.position_nm ,b.authority_nm ,a.enc_email from cmmt_insider a join cmmt_authority b on a.authority_id = b.authority_id where
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}
